StmtSimple.StatementText: SELECT MIN(chn.name) AS uncredited_voiced_character, MIN(t.title) AS russian_movie FROM job.char_name AS chn, job.cast_info AS ci, job.company_name AS cn, job.company_type AS ct, job.movie_companies AS mc, job.role_type AS rt, job.title AS t WHERE ci.note LIKE '%(voice)%' AND ci.note LIKE '%(uncredited)%' AND cn.country_code = '[ru]' AND rt.role = 'actor' AND t.production_year > 2005 AND t.id = mc.movie_id AND t.id = ci.movie_id AND ci.movie_id = mc.movie_id AND chn.id = ci.person_role_id AND rt.id = ci.role_id AND cn.id = mc.company_id AND ct.id = mc.company_type_id
